title: dodonaea viscosa subsp. angustissima
intro: Dodonaea viscosa subsp. angustissima, also known as narrow-leaved sticky hopbush, is a plant species that belongs to the family Sapindaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The leaves and stems of Dodonaea viscosa subsp. angustissima are used to treat various health issues, such as wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems, due to their health benefits, including promoting wound healing and reducing inflammation. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
